hooks.command: $status = git status --porcelain 2>&1; if ($status) { $null = & .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest services/ -x -q --ignore=services/cv/tests/test_detector.py 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { git add -A; git commit -m 'auto: commit session changes'; git push origin main 2>&1 | Out-Null; Write-Output '{"systemMessage":"Auto-committed and pushed."}' } else { Write-Output '{"systemMessage":"Auto-commit skipped: tests failed."}' } }

try { $raw = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $json = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $file = $json.tool_input.file_path; if ($file -and ($file -match '\.py$') -and ($file -notmatch 'test_')) { $dir = Split-Path $file -Parent; $base = [IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($file); $testPath = "$dir\tests\test_$base.py"; if (-not (Test-Path $testPath)) { $ctx = "No test file found for $file. Create tests at $testPath before finishing."; Write-Output "{`"hookSpecificOutput`":{`"hookEventName`":`"PostToolUse`",`"additionalContext`":`"$ctx`"}}" } } } catch {}
